headline: 《奥德赛》领跑本周，新片《希曼》今日上映
headlineEn: Odyssey Leads the Week, New Film He-Man Released Today
summary: 今日《宇宙巨人：希曼崛起》上映，本周《奥德赛》《揭秘日》热度领先，多部新片竞争激烈。
summaryEn: Masters of the Universe: Revelation hits theaters today; Odyssey and Revelation Day top weekly trends amid fierce competition.

industryHighlights.text: 今日仅一部新片上映，市场略显冷清
industryHighlights.en: Only one new release today, market remains quiet

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》蝉联本周搜索热度冠军
industryHighlights.en: Odyssey retains top search trend of the week

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》受期待，即将上映
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Fresh Start highly anticipated, coming soon

industryHighlights.text: 《惊声尖笑6》本周热度飙升，恐怖喜剧回温
industryHighlights.en: Scary Movie 6 surges this week, horror-comedy revival

industryHighlights.text: 《逃出绝命街》定档，悬疑片再添看点
industryHighlights.en: Escape from Death Street scheduled, adding suspense buzz
